title: Opuntia
description: An addon for Cactus Mod that adds a minimal sneak/sprint HUD. Lightweight, simple, and new features are coming soon.
body:
Opuntia is a new lightweight [Cactus Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/cactus) addon that adds a fully customizable sneak/sprint HUD.
It is currently minimal but it’s designed to expand with future updates with QoL features and more modules.
